# PromptBasic IDE - AI-Optimized Documentation Summary

## Project Overview
PromptBasic IDE is a web-based visual programming environment where natural language prompts replace traditional code in event handlers. It combines drag-and-drop UI design with AI-powered code generation using Anthropic's Claude API.

**Key Technologies:** React, Vite, Node.js/Express, Anthropic Claude API

**Version:** 1.0.0  
**License:** MIT

---

## Documentation Structure

### Quick Navigation

| Document | Purpose | Audience | Key Topics |
|----------|---------|----------|-----------|
| [docs/README.md](docs/README.md) | Documentation index and entry point | All users | Navigation, support resources, community links |
| [docs/overview.md](docs/overview.md) | Project explanation and capabilities | Beginners, decision-makers | What it is, how it works, target audience, innovation, tech stack, limitations |
| [docs/getting-started.md](docs/getting-started.md) | Setup and installation guide | Developers | Prerequisites, installation steps, environment setup, troubleshooting, first run |
| [docs/tutorial.md](docs/tutorial.md) | Step-by-step application building | Beginners, learners | Planning, UI controls, properties, natural language prompts, testing, debugging |
| [docs/architecture.md](docs/architecture.md) | Technical system design | Developers, architects | Frontend components, backend structure, AI integration, security, performance, deployment |
| [docs/api.md](docs/api.md) | REST API reference | Backend developers | Endpoints, request/response formats, authentication, error codes, SDK examples, best practices |
| [docs/troubleshooting.md](docs/troubleshooting.md) | Problem diagnosis and solutions | All users | Setup issues, API problems, runtime errors, performance, development issues with solutions |
| [docs/faq.md](docs/faq.md) | Frequently asked questions | All users | General questions, technical details, costs, features, limitations, legal |
| [docs/contributing.md](docs/contributing.md) | Contributor guidelines | Contributors | Development setup, workflow, coding standards, testing, pull requests, recognition |

---

## Core Concepts

### Natural Language Programming
Users describe UI interactions in English instead of writing code. Example:
- Input: "When button is clicked, show message 'Hello World'"
- Generated: `document.getElementById('btn').addEventListener('click', () => alert('Hello World'));`

### Three-Phase Development
1. **Design:** Drag-and-drop UI controls onto canvas
2. **Prompt:** Double-click controls, write natural language event handlers
3. **Run:** AI interprets prompts and generates live-executable JavaScript

### Supported UI Controls
Button, TextBox, Label, CheckBox, RadioButton, ComboBox, ListBox, PictureBox, Timer

---

## API Endpoints

### POST /api/messages
- **Purpose:** Process natural language prompts and generate code
- **Input:** Messages array, system prompt, max_tokens, temperature
- **Output:** AI-generated JavaScript code in response.content[0].text
- **Authentication:** Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable

### GET /api/health
- **Purpose:** Health check endpoint
- **Output:** Status, timestamp, version, uptime

---

## Setup Requirements

### Prerequisites
- Node.js 16+
- npm 8+
- Git
- Anthropic API key (signup at https://console.anthropic.com/)

### Installation Quick Steps
```bash
git clone https://github.com/tholewis/promptbasic-ide.git
cd promptbasic-ide
npm install
export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-your-key-here
npm run dev
```

### Ports
- Frontend: http://localhost:3000
- Backend: http://localhost:3001

---

## Key Considerations

### Costs
- Software is open source and free
- Anthropic API usage incurs costs based on Claude model pricing
- Each prompt generates API calls

### Security
- API keys managed via environment variables (never in code)
- `.env` file is in .gitignore
- Client-side code execution, no server-side data storage
- No API keys exposed in browser

### Limitations
- Requires internet connection (Anthropic API dependency)
- Extremely complex applications still benefit from traditional coding
- AI generation accuracy depends on prompt clarity
- No native offline support (planned for future)

### Performance
- AI response time: 1-3 seconds typically
- Browser-limited by control count and complexity
- Performance degrades with very complex prompts

---

## Common Patterns

### Effective Prompts
- ✅ Be specific: "When btnSave is clicked, validate email in txtEmail"
- ✅ Reference controls: Use exact control IDs/names
- ✅ Break down logic: Use multiple simple prompts for complex flows
- ❌ Avoid ambiguous: "Do something when clicked"

### Error Handling Pipeline
- Browser logs to console
- AI responds within 1-3 seconds or timeout
- Failed prompts show JavaScript errors
- User refines prompt and retries

---

## Development

### Tech Stack
- **Frontend:** React 18, Vite, CSS modules
- **Backend:** Node.js 16+, Express
- **Build:** npm (yarn compatible)
- **Testing:** Jest, React Testing Library, Playwright
- **Deployment:** Docker-ready, multiple hosts supported

### Build Commands
```bash
npm run dev      # Start development server
npm run build    # Production build
npm run preview  # Preview production build
npm test         # Run tests
```

### Repository Structure
```
/
├── src/                          # Frontend React app
│   ├── main.jsx                  # React entry point
│   └── PromptBasicIDE.jsx        # Main IDE component
├── docs/                         # User documentation
│   ├── overview.md
│   ├── getting-started.md
│   ├── tutorial.md
│   ├── architecture.md
│   ├── api.md
│   ├── troubleshooting.md
│   ├── faq.md
│   ├── contributing.md
│   └── ai_friendly_docs.md
├── server.js                     # Express backend API proxy
├── package.json                  # Dependencies and scripts
├── vite.config.js                # Vite build configuration
├── index.html                    # HTML entry point
├── .gitignore                    # Git ignore rules (includes .env)
└── README.md                     # Project README
```

---

## Troubleshooting Reference

| Issue | Cause | Solution |
|-------|-------|----------|
| "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is required" | Missing environment variable | Create .env file with API key |
| "Invalid API key" | Wrong/expired key | Regenerate key at Anthropic console |
| "Rate limit exceeded" | Too many API calls | Implement exponential backoff retry |
| Application slow | Complex prompts/many controls | Simplify prompts, reduce control count |
| Prompts don't work | Ambiguous instructions | Use specific control names, clearer language |

---

## Version Information

**Last Updated:** April 10, 2026  
**Current Version:** 1.0.0  
**Node.js Minimum:** 16  
**Supported Browsers:** Chrome 90+, Firefox 88+, Safari 14+, Edge 90+

---

## Key Files and Entry Points

- **User Entry:** http://localhost:3000 (frontend)
- **API Entry:** http://localhost:3001/api/messages (backend)
- **Documentation:** docs/ directory
- **Main Code:** src/PromptBasicIDE.jsx
- **Configuration:** .env (local setup)

For detailed information on any topic, consult the specific documentation file listed in the structure table above.
